title: Verific doesn't represent write port priority
code_blocks:
cell $memwr $verific$clk_write_port_8$memtest.sv:24$15
    parameter \WIDTH 16
    parameter \ABITS 16
    parameter \PRIORITY 0
    parameter \CLK_POLARITY 1
    parameter \CLK_ENABLE 1
    parameter \MEMID "\\mem"
    connect \DATA $verific$n24$5
    connect \ADDR \addr_b
    connect \CLK \clk
    connect \EN ...
  end

  attribute \src "memtest.sv:22.9-22.20"
  cell $memwr $verific$clk_write_port_5$memtest.sv:22$13
    parameter \WIDTH 16
    parameter \ABITS 16
    parameter \PRIORITY 0
    parameter \CLK_POLARITY 1
    parameter \CLK_ENABLE 1
    parameter \MEMID "\\mem"
    connect \DATA $verific$n5$4
    connect \ADDR \addr_a
    connect \CLK \clk
    connect \EN ...
  end
